options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage <{llx lly urx ury}> # Specifies the lower left x and y , upper right x and y coordinates of the pin guide. (box, required) <pinGuideName> # Specifies name of the pin, wildcard can be specified (string, required) <metalLayer> # Specifies the layer on which the pin guide resides. (string, required) <minSpace> # Specifies the minimum pin spacing for the pin guide. (int, required) <pinGroupCell> # Specifies the cell name if the pin guide is associated with a cell pin group.
